answer: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title had an overstated escrow disbursement reconciliation variance because `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` joined `party_identity_bridge` on `normalized_tax_id` instead of `closing_party_role_id`, which duplicated disbursements in `finance.disbursement_recon_daily`.

facts.remediation: Switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins, and backfill Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title.
facts.root_cause: settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 joined party_identity_bridge by normalized_tax_id, and that key is reused across multiple buyer/seller roles so it duplicated escrow disbursements.
